bot_answer: Alea Henle was named head of the newly formed Access & Borrow department, which includes circulation [2]. The staff directory page is the place to look up the current head of circulation [1].
The dean of the Miami University Libraries in Oxford is Jerome U. Conley, listed as Dean & University Librarian [3][4].
Yes—use the Libraries’ “Ask a Librarian” page to chat with a librarian online (it shows the current live chat status and chat hours) [1].
